title: Taghazout Skate Park
description: Enjoy an easygoing session at the Taghazout skate park where you can ride, play, and move with total freedom. A relaxed, fun atmosphere for all levels, ending with dinner together in town.

title: Sandboarding
description: Glide down soft dunes and enjoy a simple, laughter-filled adventure in open landscapes. Light, playful, and perfect for anyone who wants easy fun.

title: Quad Biking
description: A freedom-filled quad ride, where wild dunes meet the ocean's edge, in a fast and fun adventure. Great energy and a memorable moment for groups.

title: Hiking
description: Walk through peaceful mountain trails, discover beautiful viewpoints, and reconnect with nature. A grounding, scenic experience with outdoor lunch included.

title: Horse Riding
description: Ride gentle, well-trained horses along peaceful dunes and breathtaking coastlines. A calm and beautiful way to explore the area, perfect even for beginners.

title: Camel Trek
description: A slow, timeless ride across soft coastal dunes followed by a warm cultural evening of traditional dinner and local music.
notes: Includes cultural dinner and local music

title: Sunset Yoga
description: A soft evening practice with ocean views and gentle light. Grounding movement, deep breaths, and a peaceful way to end your day.

title: Hot Springs
description: Relax in warm, mineral-rich waters surrounded by rocky hills and a lush green meadow. Simple, soothing, and deeply restorative.

title: Paradise Valley
description: Swim in emerald pools, rest beside running rivers, or explore palm-filled trails. A refreshing blend of chill and adventure.

title: Hammam Spa
description: A traditional Moroccan hammam with steam, exfoliation, and natural treatments. Cleansing, comforting, and fully renewing.

title: Deep Tissue Massage
description: A slow, intentional massage that melts deep tension and supports full-body recovery. Perfect after surf, travel, or long days.

title: Pottery Class
description: Learn Amazigh pottery techniques and shape clay with local artisans. A grounding, creative moment where you leave with your own handmade piece.

title: Jewellery Workshop
description: Create your own piece in a warm, hands-on workshop led by a local woman artisan.

title: Cooking Class
description: Visit the Anza Wednesday souk for fresh ingredients, then cook a traditional Moroccan meal together. A full, authentic local experience from market to plate.

title: Agadir Souk & Medina
description: Explore the lively souk, handmade crafts, and the historic medina with a local guide. Full of colour, stories, and a delicious lunch tucked inside Agadir's fish market.
notes: Includes lunch at Agadir fish market

title: Ancestral Beauty & Henna
description: Explore old Amazigh beauty recipes, natural treatments, and traditional henna symbols with a local woman.

title: Cultural Day Trip
description: Ancient caves, Amazigh villages, swimming spots, scenic walks, and a homemade lunch - a rich blend of nature and culture.

title: Tarot Reading
description: Intuitive tarot session in a calm, held space. Subject to availability and group size; final price may vary.
notes: Request only; not a package checkout add-on

title: Breathwork Session
description: Guided breathwork to regulate energy and deepen presence. Subject to availability; final price may vary.
notes: Request only; not a package checkout add-on

title: Sound Healing
description: Sound-based relaxation and restoration. Not available in the Surf & Stay add-on list per client matrix.
notes: Request only; B&B enquiries only for Surf & Stay exclusion

title: Healing Herbs & Tea Workshop
description: Explore local herbs and tea blending with a gentle, hands-on session. Subject to availability; final price may vary.
notes: Request only; not a package checkout add-on

title: Fire & Intentions Workshop
description: Evening intention-setting around the fire in a shared ritual space. Not available in the Surf & Stay add-on list per client matrix.
notes: Request only; B&B enquiries only for Surf & Stay exclusion

title: Amazigh Symbols & Traditional Tattoos
description: Learn Amazigh symbols and traditional tattoo culture in a respectful, educational session. Subject to availability; final price may vary.
notes: Request only; not a package checkout add-on
